fix_strategy: Remove [[bin]] block from standalone tldr-daemon/tldr-mcp crates AND set autobins=false to disable Cargo auto-bin discovery (which would otherwise re-create the bin target from src/main.rs and re-introduce the collision)

red_evidence.warning_text_canonical:
warning: output filename collision at <path>
  = note: the bin target `<name>` in package `<standalone> v0.2.2` has the same output filename as the bin target `<name>` in package `tldr-cli v0.2.2`
  = note: this may become a hard error in the future; see https://github.com/rust-lang/cargo/issues/6313
  = help: consider changing their names to be unique or compiling them separately

clippy.workspace_note: cargo clippy --workspace currently fails in tldr-cli/commands/daemon/status.rs (cmp_owned) and tldr-core/analysis/change_impact.rs (unused fn) — both files owned by sibling M11 (VAL-010) and M14 (VAL-013) per disjointness rule; not in M13's scope (Cargo.toml-only).
